list.name: Changes
list.comment: OreCzml V2.0 changes : - Name reworked : OreCZML -> OreCzml - Repository root renamed : org.example -> org.orekit.czml - JavaDoc of all classes added. - Renamed : CZMLFile -> CzmlFile. - REWORK : renamed generateCZML() -> writeCZMLBlock() . The writeCZMLBlocks function will be called directly in the CZMLFile.java instead of each time a primary object is added. - REWORK : The user only need to build a CzmlFile now, add the objects with the addObject(Object) function then call CzmlFile.write(); - Add the AbstractPrimaryObject class to add a layer and a common ground for each PrimaryObject. - Added scr/tutorial for future tutorials added here. - The OreCzml main for test is now in tutorials. - Added LowEarthOrbitSatellite tutorial in Tutorials. - Header object can no longer be built with a propagator. - Renamed CZMLGroundStation -> CzmlGroundStation - CzmlGroundStation can no longer be built with an Orekit groundStation. - A directory CzmlEnum has been created for each enum used. - Add a presentation image for the Readme.md - A Header.MASTER_CLOCK is not available to be used as a global clock.

task.summary: Deletes some useless files and removed the node modules

OreCzml V2.0 changes : - Name reworked : OreCZML -> OreCzml - Repository root renamed : org.example -> org.orekit.czml - JavaDoc of all classes added. - Renamed : CZMLFile -> CzmlFile. - REWORK : renamed generateCZML() -> writeCZMLBlock() . The writeCZMLBlocks function will be called directly in the CZMLFile.java instead of each time a primary object is added. - REWORK : The user only need to build a CzmlFile now, add the objects with the addObject(Object) function then call CzmlFile.write(); - Add the AbstractPrimaryObject class to add a layer and a common ground for each PrimaryObject. - Added scr/tutorial for future tutorials added here. - The OreCzml main for test is now in tutorials. - Added LowEarthOrbitSatellite tutorial in Tutorials. - Header object can no longer be built with a propagator. - Renamed CZMLGroundStation -> CzmlGroundStation - CzmlGroundStation can no longer be built with an Orekit groundStation. - A directory CzmlEnum has been created for each enum used. - Add a presentation image for the Readme.md - A Header.MASTER_CLOCK is not available to be used as a global clock.

OreCzml V2.0 changes : - Name reworked : OreCZML -> OreCzml - Repository root renamed : org.example -> org.orekit.czml - JavaDoc of all classes added. - Renamed : CZMLFile -> CzmlFile. - REWORK : renamed generateCZML() -> writeCZMLBlock() . The writeCZMLBlocks function will be called directly in the CZMLFile.java instead of each time a primary object is added. - REWORK : The user only need to build a CzmlFile now, add the objects with the addObject(Object) function then call CzmlFile.write(); - Add the AbstractPrimaryObject class to add a layer and a common ground for each PrimaryObject. - Added scr/tutorial for future tutorials added here. - The OreCzml main for test is now in tutorials. - Added LowEarthOrbitSatellite tutorial in Tutorials. - Header object can no longer be built with a propagator. - Renamed CZMLGroundStation -> CzmlGroundStation - CzmlGroundStation can no longer be built with an Orekit groundStation. - A directory CzmlEnum has been created for each enum used. - Add a presentation image for the Readme.md - A Header.MASTER_CLOCK is not available to be used as a global clock.

OreCzml V2.0 changes : - Name reworked : OreCZML -> OreCzml - Repository root renamed : org.example -> org.orekit.czml - JavaDoc of all classes added. - Renamed : CZMLFile -> CzmlFile. - REWORK : renamed generateCZML() -> writeCZMLBlock() . The writeCZMLBlocks function will be called directly in the CZMLFile.java instead of each time a primary object is added. - REWORK : The user only need to build a CzmlFile now, add the objects with the addObject(Object) function then call CzmlFile.write(); - Add the AbstractPrimaryObject class to add a layer and a common ground for each PrimaryObject. - Added scr/tutorial for future tutorials added here. - The OreCzml main for test is now in tutorials. - Added LowEarthOrbitSatellite tutorial in Tutorials. - Header object can no longer be built with a propagator. - Renamed CZMLGroundStation -> CzmlGroundStation - CzmlGroundStation can no longer be built with an Orekit groundStation. - A directory CzmlEnum has been created for each enum used. - Add a presentation image for the Readme.md - A Header.MASTER_CLOCK is not available to be used as a global clock.

OreCzml V2.0 changes : - Name reworked : OreCZML -> OreCzml - Repository root renamed : org.example -> org.orekit.czml - JavaDoc of all classes added. - Renamed : CZMLFile -> CzmlFile. - REWORK : renamed generateCZML() -> writeCZMLBlock() . The writeCZMLBlocks function will be called directly in the CZMLFile.java instead of each time a primary object is added. - REWORK : The user only need to build a CzmlFile now, add the objects with the addObject(Object) function then call CzmlFile.write(); - Add the AbstractPrimaryObject class to add a layer and a common ground for each PrimaryObject. - Added scr/tutorial for future tutorials added here. - The OreCzml main for test is now in tutorials. - Added LowEarthOrbitSatellite tutorial in Tutorials. - Header object can no longer be built with a propagator. - Renamed CZMLGroundStation -> CzmlGroundStation - CzmlGroundStation can no longer be built with an Orekit groundStation. - A directory CzmlEnum has been created for each enum used. - Add a presentation image for the Readme.md - A Header.MASTER_CLOCK is not available to be used as a global clock.

MESSAGE.value: Deletes some useless files and removed the node modules

OreCzml V2.0 changes : - Name reworked : OreCZML -> OreCzml - Repository root renamed : org.example -> org.orekit.czml - JavaDoc of all classes added. - Renamed : CZMLFile -> CzmlFile. - REWORK : renamed generateCZML() -> writeCZMLBlock() . The writeCZMLBlocks function will be called directly in the CZMLFile.java instead of each time a primary object is added. - REWORK : The user only need to build a CzmlFile now, add the objects with the addObject(Object) function then call CzmlFile.write(); - Add the AbstractPrimaryObject class to add a layer and a common ground for each PrimaryObject. - Added scr/tutorial for future tutorials added here. - The OreCzml main for test is now in tutorials. - Added LowEarthOrbitSatellite tutorial in Tutorials. - Header object can no longer be built with a propagator. - Renamed CZMLGroundStation -> CzmlGroundStation - CzmlGroundStation can no longer be built with an Orekit groundStation. - A directory CzmlEnum has been created for each enum used. - Add a presentation image for the Readme.md - A Header.MASTER_CLOCK is not available to be used as a global clock.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: OreCzml V2.0 changes : - Name reworked : OreCZML -> OreCzml - Repository root renamed : org.example -> org.orekit.czml - JavaDoc of all classes added. - Renamed : CZMLFile -> CzmlFile. - REWORK : renamed generateCZML() -> writeCZMLBlock() . The writeCZMLBlocks function will be called directly in the CZMLFile.java instead of each time a primary object is added. - REWORK : The user only need to build a CzmlFile now, add the objects with the addObject(Object) function then call CzmlFile.write(); - Add the AbstractPrimaryObject class to add a layer and a common ground for each PrimaryObject. - Added scr/tutorial for future tutorials added here. - The OreCzml main for test is now in tutorials. - Added LowEarthOrbitSatellite tutorial in Tutorials. - Header object can no longer be built with a propagator. - Renamed CZMLGroundStation -> CzmlGroundStation - CzmlGroundStation can no longer be built with an Orekit groundStation. - A directory CzmlEnum has been created for each enum used. - Add a presentation image for the Readme.md - A Header.MASTER_CLOCK is not available to be used as a global clock.
